gist.headline: The hive learns to speak Qwen
gist.blurb: We've added Qwen3-TTS models to our audio endpoints. Now you can generate speech with fine-grained emotion and style controls, giving your apps a whole new voice.
gist.summary: Integrated Qwen3-TTS and Qwen3-TTS-Instruct audio models into the /v1/audio/speech endpoint via DashScope.
gist.impact: Developers can now generate high-quality text-to-speech using Qwen models, including an instruct variant that supports custom emotion and style parameters.
gist.visual_concept: The pollinations.ai bee mascot wearing a tiny director's beret, holding a megaphone and directing a cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head that is speaking into a retro microphone. Pixel sound waves and musical notes floating around.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny director's beret, holding a megaphone while directing a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head speaking into a retro microphone. Colorful pixel sound waves and musical notes float in the air. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny director's beret, holding a megaphone while directing a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head speaking into a retro microphone. Colorful pixel sound waves and musical notes float in the air. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley.
